import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> Int
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  mut stopped = false
  mut has_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n and not stopped
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if has_num
        let num = sign * val
        if num < 0
          stopped = true
        else
          sum = sum + num
          has_num = false
          sign = 1
          val = 0
        end
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      has_num = true
    else if b == 43
      has_num = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_num and not stopped
    let num = sign * val
    if num >= 0
      sum = sum + num
    end
  end
  sum
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let p = process(line)
  print("partial=#{p}")
when None
  print("partial=0")
end
